Although AddThis offers some analytics and usage data to CDC, these reports do not include any personally identifiable information. The reports are password protected and only available to members of CDC and other designated staff requiring this information to perform their duties. The AddThis Privacy policy is available at: https://www.oracle.com/legal/privacy/
